Off Calendar Oct-16-2015 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Oct-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT TWITTER INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication is taken off calendar. A notice of settlement of the entire case was filed on September 28, 2015. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Oct-07-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to compel production of documents is off calendar. Plaintiff filed a notice of settlement on September 29, 2015. Judge Pro Tem: Naomi Jane Gray, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion For A Letter Of Request For International Assistance Pursuant To The Hague Convention On The Taking Of Evidence Abroad In Civil Or Commercial Matters
Off Calendar Jul-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carl Lippenberger, Esq., 415.389.8900, for Plaintiff Peter Taylor; no other appearances.

Matter on calendar for hearing: PLAINTIFF PETER TAYLOR's Motion For A Letter Of Request For International Assistance Pursuant To The Hague Convention On The Taking Of Evidence Abroad In Civil Or Commercial Matters.

Counsel for plaintiff does not stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem.

Moving papers reviewed/motion GRANTED by the Judge Pro Tem and forwarded to Department 302 for processing.

Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquist, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported (302).

Off Calendar Nov-26-2014 Set For Trial On Oct-05-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
